rationale: Review 1 caught a real, confirmable reuse problem — genuinely general lemmas like `BialgHom.map_antipode`, `Bialgebra.TensorProduct.map_id`/`map_comp` are marked `private`, blocking downstream TauCeti reuse — which Review 2 missed entirely (even praising that content as novel without noticing it is inaccessible). Review 1 does overreach on calling the `map_*` API simp lemmas redundant, but it offers non-destructive keep options, so following it yields a net-better PR than Review 2's clean approve.
